underlying_goal: Fix a FileNotFoundError bug in watches.json handling and rename a nav tab from 'Playlist Watches' to 'Scheduled Downloads'
friction_detail: Initial fix used makedirs for /app path which fails locally without root permissions; required a second iteration to use a local-friendly default path.
brief_summary: User asked to fix a FileNotFoundError and rename a nav tab; the rename succeeded but the bug fix needed rework due to Docker-vs-local path issues, and the session was interrupted before completion.
